Blitz.name: Blitz
Blitz.effect: After taking 120 damage, afflicted foes get struck by lightning.

Daze.name: Daze
Daze.effect: Afflicted foes have 20% chance to deal no damage.

Freeze.name: Freeze
Freeze.effect: Afflicted foes are stopped for 2 Sec. Can be reapplied after 10 Sec.

Froth.name: Froth
Froth.effect: When hit, afflicted foes have a 25% chance to take 50 damage.

Glow.name: Glow
Glow.effect: Afflicted foes take +15% damage for 5 Sec.

Gust.name: Gust
Gust.effect: Afflicted foes are 20% slower and their ranged shots 60% slower.

Hitch.name: Hitch
Hitch.effect: Afflicted foes take 30% of damage dealt to other afflicted foes.

Marked.name: Marked
Marked.effect: Afflicted foes have +30% chance to take Critical damage.

Morph.name: Morph
Morph.effect: Afflicted foes turn into harmless critters.

Scorch.name: Scorch
Scorch.effect: Afflicted foes take 100 damage accrued from this every 1 Sec.

Scorn.name: Scorn
Scorn.effect: Afflicted foes take +30% Attack and Special damage.

Weak.name: Weak
Weak.effect: Afflicted foes deal at least 30% less damage.

Wounds.name: Wounds
Wounds.effect: Your strike has +50 Power when inflicting this. Can be re-applied after 3 Sec.
